title: ZenaviaQoL
description: Quality of Life client mod for the Infecté game mode on the Zenavia Minecraft server.
body:
## 🧟 Zenavia Infecté – Client QoL Mod

Zenavia Infecté is a lightweight client-side Quality of Life mod designed specifically for the **Infecté** game mode on the Zenavia Minecraft server.

This mod enhances the gameplay experience by improving visual feedback, immersion, and in-game information - without affecting balance or giving unfair advantages.

## ✨ Features

### 🧟 Zombie Disguise System

* Automatically disguises you as a zombie when you become infected.
* Improves immersion and roleplay feeling.
* Fully synchronized with the Infecté game logic.

### 🟢 Infection Overlay

* Green contamination overlay when you get infected.
* Clear visual feedback for transformation moments.
* Smooth and immersive transition effect.

### 🎯 Tracker Interface

* Built-in tracking interface.
* Clean UI designed for competitive gameplay.
* Helps players stay aware without cluttering the screen.

### 📊 End-Game Recap

* Detailed recap screen after each match.
* Displays key statistics and performance summary.
* Makes every game feel complete and rewarding.

### 👀 Rear View Camera

* Quick rear-view feature.
* Perfect for checking behind you during intense chases.
* Smooth and lightweight implementation.

### 🖥 Custom Interfaces

* Enhanced UI elements tailored for Infecté.
* Modern, clean, and minimalistic design.
* Designed to integrate naturally with Minecraft’s style.

## ⚙️ Important

* This is a **client-side mod**.
* It is designed specifically for the **Zenavia server**.
* It does not provide unfair gameplay advantages.
* It is fully compliant with Zenavia’s rules.

## 🧩 Compatibility

* Minecraft: 1.21.8
* Fabric
* Designed for Zenavia Infecté mode

## 🚀 Why Use This Mod?

If you play Infecté seriously, this mod:

* Improves immersion
* Enhances clarity during critical moments
* Makes matches more competitive and enjoyable
* Adds cinematic feeling to the infection system

It turns Infecté into a smoother, more modern experience.
